info.description: Customer auth and product catalog API for the Diagonals website backend.
info.title: Diagonals API

get.description: Get all detailed shipping addresses for the authenticated customer ordered by primary status first

post.description: Add a detailed shipping address for the authenticated customer, including administrative regions, street details, and optional map pin metadata (latitude/longitude)

put.description: Update an existing shipping address for the authenticated customer, including administrative regions, street details, and optional map pin metadata (latitude/longitude)

post.description: Authenticate a customer and create a new active session for the current device or browser
Revoke the authenticated session for the current device or browser and clear auth cookies
Revoke all active sessions for the authenticated customer and clear auth cookies on the current device
Validate the refresh token from HttpOnly cookie against the current session, rotate it, and update auth cookies
Register a new customer in Go-owned tables and issue access and refresh tokens

get.description: List all active sessions for the authenticated customer across devices and browsers
Get the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart

post.description: Add a product to the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart

patch.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item in the authenticated customer's cart by cart item id

delete.description: Remove a specific cart item from the authenticated customer's Redis-backed shopping cart by cart item id

post.description: Validate the authenticated customer's address, selected cart items, shipping rate, and Midtrans payment request, then create a pending transaction and remove only the selected items from cart
Calculate Biteship courier and service options for the authenticated customer's selected cart items and shipping address
Receive Biteship shipping webhook events and sync shipping status/tracking by Biteship order id. Empty body probe requests are acknowledged with 200 for webhook installation checks.

parameters.description: Webhook secret (preferred header for real events)
parameters.name: X-Biteship-Webhook-Secret

parameters.description: Webhook token passed in callback URL when custom headers are unavailable
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Biteship webhook payload; may be empty for installation probe
parameters.name: payload

200.description: notification processed | notification ignored | notification probe acknowledged

post.description: Verify Midtrans signature and update transaction payment status by order id

get.description: Get all products from the backend-owned catalog read model, optionally filtered by category slug
Get a single product with available size and color options from the backend-owned catalog read model by slug
Get paginated transaction history for the authenticated customer, optionally filtered by payment status
Get one transaction detail by order id for the authenticated customer
Get current shipping tracking data for a paid transaction. By default data is served from local transaction state; use refresh=true to fetch latest status and events from Biteship API.
Search wilayah master data for province, city, district, or village with optional parent filtering for cascading address forms

parameters.description: Wilayah level: province, city, district, village
parameters.name: level

parameters.description: Parent wilayah code for cascading search
parameters.name: parent_code
